data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of this functionality. The linked use case mentions that members get a 7-day advance booking compared to 3 days for non-members, but it does not explicitly state that members can book before the public. This lack of direct evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that members can book before the public.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
